mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals strengthening household demand and revenue expectations, so the S&P 500 earns positive forward returns over the next 20 trading days when retail sales growth is above its trailing 12-month average.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS value at decision time was 448117.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered high-RSAFS-momentum observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in 50% or fewer cases, or if the 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains near zero, real policy rates fall and investors price future tightening risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS value at decision time was 0.12 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if episodes meeting the CPI acceleration and low-FEDFUNDS condition have average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than or equal to the unconditional average over a 5-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in UNRATE signals improving labor income and lower recession risk, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days after unemployment falls quickly from elevated levels.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses down by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE value at decision time was 5.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-decline triggers are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 45% of observations, or if average triggered returns are not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO over 3 months signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, which raises expected earnings and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO value at decision time was 107.2123 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum does not generate a positive 20-day return hit rate above 55% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST signals weakening residential investment and reduced cyclical demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST value at decision time was 1060.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST year-over-year declines below -10% are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS momentum turns negative while PAYEMS keeps rising, demand weakens while labor costs remain sticky, compressing margins and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change crosses below 0 while PAYEMS 3-month change remains above 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest available PAYEMS value at decision time was 142900.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-negative and PAYEMS-positive condition has average 20-day S&P 500 returns above zero or a return hit rate for negative outcomes below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden rise in FEDFUNDS tightens discount rates and reduces equity risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after the policy-rate increase is observed.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 1-month change crosses above 0.25 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS value at decision time was 0.12 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS jumps above the trigger are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth is positive and UNRATE is falling, broad demand and labor-market healing jointly confirm expansion, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is above 0 and UNRATE 3-month change is below 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest available GDPC1 value at decision time was 16417.8 as of t-5mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-GDPC1 and falling-UNRATE condition fails to produce average 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average in walk-forward tests.
